errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

branding.headline: Know exactly what to fix before your competitors do.
branding.subheadline: ClinicRadar turns your Google reviews and your competitors' into a short, prioritized list of tasks that move the needle.

overview.notEnoughData: Not enough data yet — run analysis a few times to see your Clinic Score.
overview.topTasksEmpty: No open tasks. Run analysis to generate some.

form.name: Business name
form.placeSearchHint: Pick your listing from Google Maps — we'll pull your data from there.
form.placeSearchNoResults: No results. Try a different name.
form.placeRequired: Select your business from Google to continue.
form.currentTool: What do you currently use for competitor/reputation tracking?

errors.already_linked: This business is already linked to an account.
errors.business_already_exists: You already have a business linked. Each account supports one business.

enrichmentFailed.title: We couldn't fetch your business data
enrichmentFailed.body: We couldn't retrieve details for this Google Place ID. Fix the Place ID (and other details if needed) below and save — we'll try fetching your data again.

discovering.title: Scanning competitors in your area
discovering.subtitle: This can take up to a minute.

selection.title: Choose your competitors
selection.subtitle: Select between 3 and {max} businesses to track.
selection.limitedResults: We found a limited number of strong competitors in your area.

errors.discover_failed: We couldn't scan competitors right now. Please try again.
errors.business_not_enriched: Your business data isn't ready yet.
errors.plan_limit_exceeded: You've selected more competitors than your plan allows.
errors.save_failed: We couldn't save your selection. Please try again.

analysis.runButtonPending: Running analysis… this can take a few minutes

errors.business_not_enriched: Your business data isn't ready yet.
errors.insufficient_competitors: Select at least 3 competitors before running analysis.
errors.apify_call_failed: We couldn't fetch reviews right now. Please try again.
errors.review_save_failed: We couldn't save the fetched reviews. Please try again.
errors.ai_provider_not_configured: Analysis isn't available right now. Please try again later.
errors.analysis_cooldown_active: You can run analysis again on {date}.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.empty: No tasks yet. Run analysis to generate some.

evidence.competitiveGap: This theme appears positively {competitorPositive} times in competitor reviews — {ownPositive} times in yours.
evidence.absoluteQuality: In the last {days} days, this theme has {ownNegative} negative mentions in your own reviews.

errors.update_failed: We couldn't update this task. Please try again.

history.title: Task History
history.empty: No completed or dismissed tasks yet.

satisfaction.title: Overall satisfaction
satisfaction.noData: No review data yet. Run analysis to see your satisfaction overview.

treatments.title: Treatments
treatments.empty: No treatment-related theme data yet. Run analysis to generate it.

pastDue.title: Your payment didn't go through
pastDue.description: Your last payment failed. Update your payment method to keep your Pro access. If it isn't updated soon, your subscription may be canceled.

checkoutError.title: Checkout failed
checkoutError.description: We couldn't start your checkout session. Please try again in a moment.

dialog.title: Are you sure you want to cancel your subscription?
dialog.description: Your subscription will be canceled at the end of the current billing period. You'll keep Pro access until then.

errors.no_active_subscription: We couldn't find an active subscription.
errors.genericError: We couldn't cancel your subscription. Please try again in a moment.

common.footer: You're receiving this because you have a business linked to your ClinicRadar account.

weeklyDigest.subject: Your weekly ClinicRadar summary for {businessName}
weeklyDigest.heading: Weekly summary — {businessName}
weeklyDigest.intro: Here's what happened in the last 7 days:

themeSpike.subject: {businessName}: sudden spike in "{theme}"
themeSpike.heading: Critical signal detected
themeSpike.body: Mentions of "{theme}" for {businessName} increased {multiplier}x compared to the previous cycle. We recommend reviewing it right away.

monthlyReport.subject: Your monthly ClinicRadar report for {businessName}
monthlyReport.heading: Monthly report — {businessName}
monthlyReport.intro: Here's your summary for the last 30 days. The full PDF report is attached.
monthlyReport.attachmentNote: Open the attached PDF for the full breakdown, including top themes and the executive summary.

meta.landingDescription: ClinicRadar reads your reviews against up to 10 competitors and turns the gap into a short list of tasks you can finish this week.
meta.pricingDescription: Simple pricing for clinics: start free, upgrade to Pro for weekly re-scans and monthly reports.

hero.title: Know exactly why the clinic down the street outsells you.
hero.subtitle: ClinicRadar reads your reviews against up to 10 competitors and turns the gap into a short list of tasks you can finish this week.

gapRead.resolvedTask: Send a follow-up message after every visit

step1.title: Connect
step1.body: Link your Google Business Profile and pick 3–10 nearby competitors.

step2.title: Compare
step2.body: We read every review and score the gap between you and them, theme by theme.

step3.title: Complete
step3.body: Work through a short, prioritized task list — not a report nobody opens.

taskEngine.title: Task engine
taskEngine.body: Every gap becomes one concrete action, not a chart to interpret.

themeAnalysis.title: Theme analysis
themeAnalysis.body: Reviews are grouped into themes like wait times or follow-up care, in your language.

weeklyRescan.title: Weekly re-scan
weeklyRescan.body: Pro plans re-check your competitors every week, not once a month.

monthlyReport.title: Monthly report
monthlyReport.body: A one-page PDF summary you can share with your team or your boss.

pricingTeaser.title: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready.

ctaBand.title: Your competitors already have reviews. Find out what they're doing right.

pricing.title: Simple pricing. Cancel anytime.
pricing.subtitle: One plan to get started, one plan for clinics that check in every week.

free.name: Free
free.tagline: Try the task engine on your own terms.

pro.name: Pro
pro.tagline: For clinics that check in every week.

faq.title: Questions
faq.a1: Yes. Cancel from your billing page whenever you like — you keep Pro access until the current period ends.
faq.a2: LemonSqueezy, our merchant of record, handles payment, tax, and invoicing for every country we support.
faq.q3: Do you store the reviews you read?
faq.a3: We store review text to analyze it, but the app never shows raw review text back to you — only a paraphrased summary of each theme.
faq.a4: Yes, upgrade or downgrade anytime from your billing page — changes apply to your next billing cycle.
